chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 247 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution on office objection as none is present for making compliance since 19.07.2023 (Flagged “A”) 18.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hashim advocate holds brief for Mr. Ali Tahir, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. It appears that the applicant is not interested in pursuing this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
